name: mem
description: Slash-command surface for agent-memory, Brent's local-only cross-agent knowledge base. Ships /mem:extract — a deterministic entry point for the extract-knowledge choreography (fresh-eyed extractor fan-out, fresh-eyed review, dedup+save via the mem CLI). Search and save deliberately stay ambient (no commands): the KB's invisibility behavior is installed by `mem init` as managed CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md blocks.
